info.title: UKG Pro
info.description: UKG Pro (formerly UltiPro) is a comprehensive human capital management (HCM) solution providing HR, payroll, time and attendance, and benefits administration. This connector accesses the UKG Pro REST API for managing employee data, configuration, payroll, and time tracking.

get.description: Retrieve person details for a specific employee.
Retrieve compensation details for a specific employee.

post.description: Look up employee IDs using various identifiers.

get.description: Retrieve employee changes within a date range.
Retrieve job history details for employees.
Retrieve direct deposit information for employees.

post.description: Get employee pay statements summary for a company or pay group for a given date range.
Get employee pay statements for a given date range.

get.description: Retrieve all employees for time and attendance.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration. Provides AI agents access to UKG Pro HR operations as tools.
